name: Polish Sausage and Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cabbage head, cut into large slices
1 1.5 lb Polish sausage, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place sliced cabbage in the crockpot.
2. Toss with diced potato, salt, and caraway seed.
3. Add sliced onion and Polish sausage to the pot.
4. Pour chicken broth over all ingredients; stir lightly.
5. Cover and cook on Low setting for 8 to 10 hours, or on High setting for 2 to 4 hours.
6. This dish pairs well with mustard, horseradish, and boiled new potatoes.
7. Makes 4 servings (approximately 3.5 quarts).
